review_title: Happy to work with and willing to be part of
description: I am proud to work for LILT. I already know many people from the team, and I received support; everyone helped when it was necessary. I have consistently demonstrated my interest in being part of the LILT team. As an engineer passionate about technology and language, I have a clear plan to utilize my knowledge of project management to become a Project Manager at LILT. I hope to join the LILT team, working remotely and collaborating with a team.
author: Michele Fardini Soares 👩🏻‍💻 ⚙️ 💡 M.
pros: The opportunity to work with different accounts and fields. I can utilize my skills in the Life Sciences for one task, but in another, I can apply my skills to technology, the music industry, and social media. I have been learning a lot because I can exercise and gain new knowledge from this experience, as I am always willing to grow.
cons: When I receive an email from LILT announcing a project to work on, and after some milliseconds, it is already unavailable. It's frustrating, and I got upset. It is almost impossible to get the job. I try to do it on my smartphone (iPhone), but I often have page errors, telling me that Chrome, Safari, Mozilla, and other browsers are not compatible. I have already reported this issue to PMs and support, but I continue experiencing problems. Additionally, I would like to inform you about the payment terms. It took too much time to complete the job—some of them, more than 45 days.

review_title: Make Lilt a Better Place for Translators and Clients
description: My experience with Lilt has been positive on the whole. The platform's interface is intuitive and user-friendly, particularly the in-context editor which allows for efficient translation. The payment system is generally reliable and transparent, which is crucial for freelancers. Finally, the availability of various project types and clients offers some degree of diversification in workload. The one thing I think needs to be improved is its task assignment mechanism. A more sophisticated approach would prioritize factors beyond speed of response. A system incorporating translator profiles, skills matching, and project-specific qualifications would be fairer, more efficient, and ultimately contribute to higher-quality translations.
author: Ning W.
pros: Quick AI-enhanced TM-based machine tanslation and reliable and transparent payments.
cons: 1. The least I like about Lilt is its current task assignment mechanism, a first-come, first-served system triggered by email notifications. Seemingly simple and straightforward, it fosters an environment prone to inefficiency and potential abuse. This system incentivizes a "race to the bottom," where translators may accept projects exceeding their expertise or available time simply to secure work. This ultimately risks delivering subpar translations, harming both client satisfaction and the platform's reputation. Furthermore, the reliance on speed of response opens the door for sophisticated bots or scripts to automatically claim assignments, leaving qualified human translators at a disadvantage. This undermines fair competition and potentially leads to a decline in overall translation quality. 2. Another annoying thing is that sometimes inconsistence can be found among accepted TMs.

review_title: A good concept where some things fail
description: The tool works well, the job lists are a bit unclear, the jobs change their position each time you open them. Quality of fuzzy matches is often low, so I have the impression that quality control in German is failing. Seems there is no competent linguistic instance to oversee overall quality-
author: Thomas H.
pros: The Contextual AI engine works really well, and the payments are allways on time.
cons: Project teams raffle many jobs, who is the fastes in accepting gets the Job. This creates an atmosphere of competition instead a team consciousness.

description: Lilt has been a great platform to work with. The AI assistance helps speed up my workflow without making me feel like I’m losing control over my translations. It’s not perfect—no tool is—but it’s one of the few platforms that actually feels like it’s working with me rather than just giving me suggestions to correct. If they keep improving the system and adding more flexibility, it could become an even stronger tool for professional translators.
author: Leo R.
pros: What I appreciate most about Lilt is how its AI actually learns from me as I translate. It doesn’t just throw generic suggestions—it starts adapting to my style, which makes my work faster and more natural. The interface is clean, easy to use, and doesn’t get in the way of my workflow. Plus, I’ve never had any issues with payments—they’re always on time, which is something every freelancer values.
cons: There are times when the platform lags, especially with larger files, which can be frustrating when I’m working on a tight deadline. I also wish there were more options for managing glossaries—sometimes I need more control over terminology to match specific client preferences.

description: Overall, my experience has been very positive, and I truly enjoy working with Lilt.
author: Shehan S.
pros: Lilt is one of the best platforms I’ve worked with as a freelance translator. The project managers are kind, responsive, and professional. The pay is above average, and payments are made promptly on a biweekly basis. There's a steady volume of work, making it a reliable source of income.
cons: The only drawback is that the platform could be made more efficient—100% matches don’t always propagate instantly, and the QA section sometimes flags false positives.

review_title: My review of the Lilt CAT tool
description: It helps me with my translation tasks by providing suggestions of already translated tasks and AI.
author: Stylianos D.
pros: Easy to access. Not too many unnecessary features.
cons: The increasing amount of bugs over time, that are not being fixed.

description: I am still new to Lilt and haven’t used all of its features yet, but my overall experience has been positive so far. The interface is clean and easy to understand, and I’m looking forward to learning more about the functions like terminology search and find & replace. One thing I’ve found a bit inconvenient is that copy and paste doesn’t always work as expected, which sometimes slows down my work. I hope to use the platform more actively in the future.
author: 由希子 児.
pros: I really like how user-friendly the interface is. The layout is clean and easy to navigate, which makes translation work much more efficient.
cons: I haven’t used the tool very much yet, so I’m still not sure how to apply functions like “Find and Replace” or terminology search to the actual translation. It would be helpful to have clearer guidance or tutorials on these features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience with them has been very satisfying!
author: Michael Sabastine Z.
pros: Steady workflow. I am very satisfied with the way the tasks come everyday.
cons: Minimal workflow. At times, the flow of tasks is very low!

review_title: It used to be good, and it can still be good again with a few improvements
description: It used to be one of my favorite platforms, but I’m not sure about it now.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: An intuitive platform that is easy to use.
cons: I personally think the assignment system is flawed.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Advanced technology for translation and project management
cons: Sometimes, machine translation is too slow.

review_title: One of my favorite work providers
description: I have worked at Lilt for quite a few years and hope to keep adding, as it's one of my best work providers. I like its professionals and tools, as well as its consistency in payments.
author: Michelle C.
pros: The PMs are friendly, and the platform is clean and intuitive.
cons: Task assignments are often first come, first served, which may be annoying. Also, I think this may lead to poorer outputs as the translators assigned may not be that versed in those tasks/domains.

description: Lilt is a powerful AI-driven translation platform that excels in enterprise localization with smart AI-human hybrid workflows and deep integrations (Shopify, GitHub, Contentful), making it ideal for large-scale, high-quality multilingual projects—but its steep learning curve, opaque enterprise pricing, and occasional AI limitations in specialized fields make it less suited for small teams or casual .
author: Abdullahi G.
pros: it is user-friendly AI-powered translation interface, seamless collaboration features, and strong focus on enterprise localization. Users particularly liked its predictive typing, context-aware suggestions, and efficient project management tools that streamlined translation workflows.
cons: users found the interface overwhelming, especially when managing complex localization projects with multiple workflows (e.g., AI vs. human-reviewed translations) . Advanced features like Lilt Create (generative AI) required training to use effectively .
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I have been working for Lilt for more than 5 years now and I am totally satisfied with the service!
author: Ghareeb S.
pros: The variety of projects and payment method!
cons: nothing but the new way of assigning tasks.

description: Overall, it is a great place to work with. Prompt response, easy payment methods.
author: Neha K.
pros: Easy to use, automation of most of the processes.
cons: I am unable to claim the tasks as the process of claiming is too quick.

review_title: Great Platform to work for linguists
description: Smooth and efficient ! Definitely one of the best platform I have worked on so far.
author: Christella B.
pros: The platform is very ergonomic and fluid. The segmentation makes the text easy to read. The platform takes in charge all the tags which can easily be copied into the target. In revision mode, error coding options are easily accessible, making the linguist's work more efficient.
cons: Updating the hours count takes ~6 hours on the platform. I wish the process was quicker.

description: My experience with Lilt has been smooth and efficient. The platform is intuitive, and the AI suggestions significantly speed up the translation process. It’s a valuable tool that keeps improving the more you use it.
author: Abdiaziz A.
pros: I liked how Lilt provides smart, real-time suggestions and learns from my edits. It makes translation faster and more accurate, and the interface is easy to use.
cons: Occasionally, the suggestions miss the context slightly, but it’s easy to adjust and improves over time with use.

review_title: My thoughts on Lilt online CAT tool
description: I liked to work with Lilt. Good tool, responsive staff. Everything you need from good translation agency.
author: Asset O.
pros: 1) I like that when you change translation of term or sentence in one place, it automatically applies it everywhere within the project. 2) It has AI which helps to insert tags in correct places. They are great time savers when it comes to translating large projects. 3) It has built-in QA
cons: I'd suggest to add offline tool too, because there are times when you need to work offline (in places with no internet).

review_title: This agency only accepts human translation.
description: I realized various assignment for this agency and I always received their payments on time.
author: Elvira B.
pros: They offer their own online translation tools but they forbid the use of machine translation. Team is ready to reply to any query. You can check the payments until they are received which is always on time. All job done is revised by a second translator.
cons: Very often job offers expire immediately as you receive it.

review_title: Lilt is one of the best!
description: My overall experience with Lilt is very satisfactory.
author: Juçara C.
pros: What I did most like about Lilt is the accuracy of the translations.
cons: What I did least like about Lilt is Jira platform.

description: Never had any issues that the team could not resolve
author: Roxzanne B.
pros: Very helpful and reactive team that always replied when I query something
cons: The system automatically calculates the time spent on your work and I was once almost short paid by $50 due to a system error

description: Simple and easy to use tool, I like to work with it
author: Vincent S.
pros: The tool is very user-friendly and simple
cons: I have to copy/paste the French quotation marks from Word, I am not sure there is a shortcut for this

description: Not happy with the assignment model at all.
author: Lucia H.
pros: I like the variety in clients and the CAT tool.
cons: The task assignment. I am never able to claim anything even if I click the email links within seconds of receiving them because they’ve already been claimed by bots.

review_title: Smooth Experience with Minor Communication Gaps
description: My overall experience with Lilt has been positive. The platform is user-friendly, the working time tracking system is efficient, and communication tools are helpful, although sometimes I’m unsure where to report specific issues.
author: Naw In K.
pros: I like their system of calculating working time. It’s very efficient and helps me keep track of how much I’ve worked on each project.
cons: I think tasks related to specific translators should be communicated via email. For example, EN to MY translators should only be emailed about EN to MY translation tasks. Lately, I've been receiving a lot of email tasks that are not related to my language pair, which can be confusing and time-consuming. Also, sometimes I face specific difficulties or issues that I would like to communicate, but I'm not sure where or how to reach out for help. It would be really helpful if there were a clear point of contact or support system dedicated to resolving these kinds of concerns.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am a translator for Lilt, and I must say that they are a very fair and helpful team. The platform is excellent, and it has all the things that I need.
author: Martin V.
pros: The interface is very transparent and fast, which is essential for my work. I also appreciate how intuitive the overall user experience is — I was able to start working efficiently without a steep learning curve. The QA and termbase integration also help streamline my workflow and ensure higher quality output.
cons: As for now, I like everything about Lilt. :)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I found it helpful for managing tasks, tracking progress, and staying organized. The AI could be better, but it got the job done.
author: Daniel K.
pros: Lilt is easy to use and helps translators work faster with smart interface and easy way to keep tabs on tasks.
cons: Lilt sometimes suggests awkward translations, and its AI doesn’t always adapt.
